docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10600:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:1741:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_lifecycle.sql`                            | client_upsert (INSERT + UPDATE), client_set_active toggle, client_get returnerer korrekt is_active. has_permission-spærring uden permission-row. is_active toggle bevarer øvrige felter. **V8 (Code walk-through #2):** assert client_upsert UPDATE rør IKKE is_active (set inaktiv → upsert med ny name → read is_active stadig false).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10601:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:1742:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_field_definitions.sql`                    | client_field_definition_upsert (INSERT + UPDATE), is_active toggle, client_field_definitions_list respekterer p_include_inactive. **Audit-PII-hashing:** insert med pii_level='direct' key i fields → audit_log har sha256-hash. **V3 (Codex V2 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL):** UPDATE af `key` afvises (errcode 22023). UPDATE af pii_level direct → none afvises (errcode 22023). pii_level none → indirect → direct accepteres. **V8 (Code walk-through #3+#4):** assert client_field_definition_upsert UPDATE rør IKKE is_active. client_field_definition_set_active toggles is_active uafhængigt.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10602:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:1743:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_logo.sql`                                 | client_logo_set + client_logo_get + client_logo_clear. **Assert client_upsert UPDATE af name/fields bevarer logo_bytes uændret** (read før+efter; sammenlign). consistency-CHECK blokerer partiel logo. client_logo_set fejler hvis ét felt er NULL.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10603:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:1744:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_node_placements_fk.sql`                   | FK virker: INSERT med ikke-eksisterende client_id fejler. DELETE af klient med åbne placements fejler RESTRICT. **V6 (Code-validering fund #6):** Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped (linje-niveau) — `core_identity.client_node_placements` er på `TX_WRAP_REQUIRED_FOR_TEST_INSERT` (`scripts/fitness.mjs:110`). Fitness-check `db-test-tx-wrap-on-immutable-insert` blokerer ellers.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10604:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:1745:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_clients_validate_fields.sql`                     | LENIENT-default: unknown key i fields → warning, INSERT accepteret. Strict-mode (`stork.clients_fields_strict='true'`): unknown key → exception. **V2 (Codex V1 MELLEM):** assert at non-object fields (`'"scalar"'::jsonb`, `'[1,2]'::jsonb`) afvises af `clients_fields_is_object`-CHECK (errcode 23514). **V2 (Codex V1 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL):** assert audit-PII-hashing rammer direct-PII keys i fields selv efter felt-definitionen er sat is_active=false.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10605:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:1746:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql` (V7 + V10 cron-context) | T1: opret aktiv klient → `client_node_place` succeeds → pending oprettes → approve+apply succeeds → placement findes. T2: `client_set_active(client_id, false)` → ny `client_node_place` på samme klient + nyt team → forvent **22023 `client_inactive`**. T3 (apply-path-scenarie): non-admin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → non-admin approver → deaktiver klient → apply → forvent **P0001 `apply_client_place: client_inactive`**. T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T5 superadmin-bypass wrapper (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success. **T6 (V10 cron-context):** superadmin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → simulér cron-apply (kør apply uden auth-context via `reset role` + direct `_apply_client_place`-call eller `pending_change_apply` som service_role) → success (bypass via `is_admin_by_employee_id(requested_by)`). **T7 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → superadmin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → success (bypass via approved_by). **T8 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → non-admin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → P0001 (ingen admin involveret). Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10606:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:1757:  2. **R7d-allowlist (KRÆVET):** Tilføj `core_identity.client_field_definitions_list` til `LEGACY_IS_ACTIVE_EXEMPT_FUNCTIONS` (`scripts/fitness.mjs:149-154`). RPC'en bruger `where p_include_inactive or is_active = true` for at filtrere aktive felt-definitioner. `client_field_definitions` har KUN is_active (ingen status-kolonne) — matcher allowliste-kommentaren: "T9-tabellerne har is_active som lifecycle-signal alene; ingen status-kolonne. Disse er allowlist'et nedenfor."

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10635:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:4096:  "public.client_field_definitions",
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10636:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:5253:Body: Niveau 1 kræver end-to-end-tjek per write-vej. V10 tilføjer/ændrer write-veje for `client_node_place`, `client_node_close`, `_apply_client_place` og `client_field_definition_set_active`, men fundament-tabellen nævner kun T10.8/T10.9/T10.10/T10.11 + T10.13. Selve steps har meget af materialet, men krydstjekket er ufuldstændigt. Manglende tjek på write-vej = KRITISK efter prefix.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10637:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:5262:Body: Niveau 1 kræver end-to-end-tjek per write-vej. V10 tilføjer/ændrer write-veje for `client_node_place`, `client_node_close`, `_apply_client_place` og `client_field_definition_set_active`, men fundament-tabellen nævner kun T10.8/T10.9/T10.10/T10.11 + T10.13. Selve steps har meget af materialet, men krydstjekket er ufuldstændigt. Manglende tjek på write-vej = KRITISK efter prefix.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10638:docs/coordination/aktiv-plan.md:11:- **Trin 10** (Klient-skabelon: core_identity.clients + client_field_definitions + logo + is_active + FK fra T9 + aktiv-check med superadmin-bypass + employee-id-baseret apply-bypass for cron-context + PII-hashing for logo) afsluttet 2026-05-21. Plan V14 efter 14 Codex-runder + 13+ Code walk-through-passes. 12 migrations + 6 smoke-tests + fitness-script-allowlist + master-plan §1.8 + §4 trin 10 rettelser. G057 + G058 registreret som teknisk gæld. Plan + krav-dok + approval-fil arkiveret i `docs/coordination/arkiv/`. Slut-rapport: TBD.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10639:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:240:| 1   | KRITISK           | Fundament-tjek               | Tabellen nævner kun T10.8/T10.9/T10.10/T10.11 + T10.13. V10 tilføjer/ændrer write-veje i T10.7b (`client_node_place`, `client_node_close`, `_apply_client_place`) + T10.10a (`client_field_definition_set_active`) — manglende krydstjek. | **ACCEPT.** Fundament-tjek-tabel udvidet med T10.7b (GRANT/policy/session-var + apply-dispatch + jsonb payload producer/consumer) og T10.10a. Eksempel-row-tjek udvidet med immutable-key + pii-downgrade-block + active-check. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10640:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:266:| 2   | G-NUMMER-KANDIDAT → ADOPT | T10.13                     | Tab/grant-INSERT-queries filtrerer på `p.name in ('clients', 'client_field_definitions')` uden at scope til `org_structure`-area. Hvis nogen senere tilføjer page med samme navn i andet area (usandsynligt, men ikke robust).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | **ADOPT.** Trivielt fix: scope queries til `org_structure`-area via JOIN på area_id.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | T10.13         |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10641:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:280:| 1   | KRITISK  | T10.6                  | `clients_validate_fields()` trigger-funktion har `cfd.is_active = true` filter. Rammer fitness-check `legacy-is-active-readers` (`scripts/fitness.mjs:830-892`). T10.16 allowlister kun `client_field_definitions_list`.                                                                    | Codex runde 7     | **ACCEPT.** Udvid T10.16 med `core_identity.clients_validate_fields`. Forretningsmæssigt korrekt at filtrere på aktive felt-definitioner i validate-trigger (LENIENT: ukendte/inaktive keys → warning) — det er ikke R7d-pattern (employees-dual-column), bare lifecycle-signal. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10642:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:282:| 3   | KRITISK  | T10.10                 | `client_field_definition_upsert` UPDATE-branch har **samme bug** med `p_is_active` default true → opdatering af inaktiv felt-definition reaktiverer den utilsigtet.                                                                                                                         | Code walk-through | **ACCEPT.** Drop `is_active` fra T10.10's UPDATE-SET-klausul. + ny T10.10a (se #4).                                                                                                                                                                                              |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10643:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:283:| 4   | MELLEM   | T10.10 / krav-dok §3.2 | Krav-dok §3.2 specificerer "Deaktivér felt-definition" som distinct funktion, men V7 har kun samlet `client_field_definition_upsert`. Ingen direct toggle-RPC.                                                                                                                              | Code walk-through | **ACCEPT.** Ny step **T10.10a**: `client_field_definition_set_active(p_field_id, p_is_active, p_change_reason)`. Matcher `client_set_active`-mønstret + krav-dok §3.2.                                                                                                           |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10644:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:305:| 3   | MELLEM   | T10.15             | Smoke-test dækker FK-eksistens + ON DELETE RESTRICT, men ikke det vigtigste forretningskrav (krav-dok §2.5.2: inaktiv klient kan ikke vælges).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | **ACCEPT.** Ny separat smoke-test `t10_client_active_check.sql` med 4 scenarier: aktiv place success, inaktiv place rejection (22023), pending-mens-aktiv + deaktiver + apply rejection (P0001), close virker på inaktiv klient.                                                                                                                                                                                   | T10.15 + ny test-fil          |

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10694:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:658:1360:### T10.12 — Read-RPC'er (`client_get`, `client_list`, `client_field_definitions_list`)
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10695:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:668:1496:  - §4 trin 10-række: erstat hele cellen med: "Klient-skabelon (core_identity.clients + client_field_definitions + logo + is_active + FK fra client_node_placements + has_permission-RPCs)". Migration-tekst og crm_match_id-tekst fjernes.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10696:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:670:1511:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_field_definitions.sql`                    | client_field_definition_upsert (INSERT + UPDATE), is_active toggle, client_field_definitions_list respekterer p_include_inactive. **Audit-PII-hashing:** insert med pii_level='direct' key i fields → audit_log har sha256-hash. **V3 (Codex V2 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL):** UPDATE af `key` afvises (errcode 22023). UPDATE af pii_level direct → none afvises (errcode 22023). pii_level none → indirect → direct accepteres. **V8 (Code walk-through #3+#4):** assert client_field_definition_upsert UPDATE rør IKKE is_active. client_field_definition_set_active toggles is_active uafhængigt.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10697:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:671:1513:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_node_placements_fk.sql`                   | FK virker: INSERT med ikke-eksisterende client_id fejler. DELETE af klient med åbne placements fejler RESTRICT. **V6 (Code-validering fund #6):** Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped (linje-niveau) — `core_identity.client_node_placements` er på `TX_WRAP_REQUIRED_FOR_TEST_INSERT` (`scripts/fitness.mjs:110`). Fitness-check `db-test-tx-wrap-on-immutable-insert` blokerer ellers.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10698:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:672:1515:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql` (V7 + V10 cron-context) | T1: opret aktiv klient → `client_node_place` succeeds → pending oprettes → approve+apply succeeds → placement findes. T2: `client_set_active(client_id, false)` → ny `client_node_place` på samme klient + nyt team → forvent **22023 `client_inactive`**. T3 (apply-path-scenarie): non-admin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → non-admin approver → deaktiver klient → apply → forvent **P0001 `apply_client_place: client_inactive`**. T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T5 superadmin-bypass wrapper (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success. **T6 (V10 cron-context):** superadmin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → simulér cron-apply (kør apply uden auth-context via `reset role` + direct `_apply_client_place`-call eller `pending_change_apply` som service_role) → success (bypass via `is_admin_by_employee_id(requested_by)`). **T7 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → superadmin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → success (bypass via approved_by). **T8 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → non-admin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → P0001 (ingen admin involveret). Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10699:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:675:1526:  2. **R7d-allowlist (KRÆVET):** Tilføj `core_identity.client_field_definitions_list` til `LEGACY_IS_ACTIVE_EXEMPT_FUNCTIONS` (`scripts/fitness.mjs:149-154`). RPC'en bruger `where p_include_inactive or is_active = true` for at filtrere aktive felt-definitioner. `client_field_definitions` har KUN is_active (ingen status-kolonne) — matcher allowliste-kommentaren: "T9-tabellerne har is_active som lifecycle-signal alene; ingen status-kolonne. Disse er allowlist'et nedenfor."
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10700:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:678:1536:    "core_identity.client_field_definitions_list", // V6 — T10.12 RPC; client_field_definitions har kun is_active, ingen status
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10701:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:679:1542:- **Afhængigheder:** T10.12 (`client_field_definitions_list`-RPC skal eksistere så allowlist-entry refererer reel funktion)
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10702:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:681:1551:| Hver write-RPC har GRANT + INSERT/UPDATE-policy + session-var  | ja     | T10.8/T10.9/T10.10/T10.10a/T10.11 — `stork.allow_clients_write` / `allow_client_field_definitions_write` + `revoke/grant execute` + has_permission('manage', true). **T10.7b** (`client_node_place` + `client_node_close` + `_apply_client_place`) — `stork.t9_write_authorized = 'true'` før `pending_change_request` (V9-fix); apply-handler tjekker eksistens (P0002) + aktiv (P0001) med employee-id-baseret admin-bypass (V10-fix); pending_change_apply-dispatcher (T9-supplement) cases `client_place` + `client_close` ramt automatisk. **T10.13** (permission-seed) — `stork.t9_write_authorized` (V4-fix) som krævet af T9-supplement's INSERT-policies på permission_pages/tabs/role_permission_grants. Default-privileges på `core_identity` schema (T1: `grant execute on functions to authenticated`) dækker GRANT for alle T10-RPC'er. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10703:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:682:1552:| Hver SELECT-policy bred nok til legitime læsere                | ja     | T10.1, T10.2 — has_permission('clients'/'client_field_definitions', 'manage', false) **tab-aware (V6-fix)**. T10.13 seeder kun tab-grants → null-tab matcher ikke; 'manage' matcher. T9-supplement's ACL-scoped policy på client_node_placements bevares uændret.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10704:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:685:1563:| `t10_client_field_definitions.sql`  | client_field_definition_upsert (uden p_match_role) + list-RPC + audit-PII-hashing for fields-keys                     | grøn             |

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10706:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:699:1665:| `docs/strategi/vision-og-principper.md`     | ja          | LÅST-AUTORITATIV | Princip 1 (data-kontrol i UI), Princip 2 (rettigheder i UI — has_permission frem for hardkodet), Princip 3 (forretningslogik som data — client_field_definitions UI-konfigurerbar), Princip 5 (greenfield-disciplin — CREATE TABLE fra bunden), Princip 6 (audit på alt der ændrer data — audit-trigger på alle write-tabeller), Princip 9 (status-modeller bevarer historik — is_active erstatter DELETE)                                    | nej                                                                                                                                                                                  |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10707:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:702:1685:- Fundament-tjek-tabel udvidet med T10.7b's komplette write-vej (`client_node_place` + `client_node_close` + `_apply_client_place` + apply-dispatch + jsonb producer/consumer) + T10.10a (`client_field_definition_set_active`).

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10709:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:709:1721:- T10.1 + T10.2 SELECT-policies + T10.11 client_logo_get + T10.12 read-RPC'er: alle skiftet fra `has_permission(p, null, false)` til `has_permission(p, 'manage', false)` — tab-aware. docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10732:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:1047:### `clients` + `client_field_definitions` får retention_type='permanent' (kræver allowlist-udvidelse)
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10733:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:1049:**Begrundelse:** Krav-dok §2.5.1 + §2.5.2 siger klient-rækken bevares evigt; client_field_definitions er konfig-tabel der også bevares evigt. `permanent` matcher denne semantik bedst. D1b-allowlist skal udvides for at retention-validate-trigger ikke blokerer.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10734:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:1055:### `client_field_definitions` er global (ikke pr-klient)

For at ændre `key`: marker den gamle definition `is_active=false` og INSERT en ny. For at sænke pii-niveau: behandl som ny definition.

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10832:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:2010:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_lifecycle.sql`                            | client_upsert (INSERT + UPDATE), client_set_active toggle, client_get returnerer korrekt is_active. has_permission-spærring uden permission-row. is_active toggle bevarer øvrige felter. **V8 (Code walk-through #2):** assert client_upsert UPDATE rør IKKE is_active (set inaktiv → upsert med ny name → read is_active stadig false).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10833:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:2011:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_field_definitions.sql`                    | client_field_definition_upsert (INSERT + UPDATE), is_active toggle, client_field_definitions_list respekterer p_include_inactive. **Audit-PII-hashing:** insert med pii_level='direct' key i fields → audit_log har sha256-hash. **V3 (Codex V2 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL):** UPDATE af `key` afvises (errcode 22023). UPDATE af pii_level direct → none afvises (errcode 22023). pii_level none → indirect → direct accepteres. **V8 (Code walk-through #3+#4):** assert client_field_definition_upsert UPDATE rør IKKE is_active. client_field_definition_set_active toggles is_active uafhængigt.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10834:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:2012:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_logo.sql`                                 | client_logo_set + client_logo_get + client_logo_clear. **Assert client_upsert UPDATE af name/fields bevarer logo_bytes uændret** (read før+efter; sammenlign). consistency-CHECK blokerer partiel logo. client_logo_set fejler hvis ét felt er NULL. **V12 (Codex runde 11 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL):** assert at `audit_log.new_values` har `logo_filename` + `logo_bytes` SHA256-hashed (ikke klartekst) efter `client_logo_set`-kald. `logo_content_type` forbliver i klartekst i audit (pii_level='none').                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10835:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:2013:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_node_placements_fk.sql`                   | FK virker: INSERT med ikke-eksisterende client_id fejler. DELETE af klient med åbne placements fejler RESTRICT. **V6 (Code-validering fund #6):** Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped (linje-niveau) — `core_identity.client_node_placements` er på `TX_WRAP_REQUIRED_FOR_TEST_INSERT` (`scripts/fitness.mjs:110`). Fitness-check `db-test-tx-wrap-on-immutable-insert` blokerer ellers.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10836:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:2014:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_clients_validate_fields.sql`                     | LENIENT-default: unknown key i fields → warning, INSERT accepteret. Strict-mode (`stork.clients_fields_strict='true'`): unknown key → exception. **V2 (Codex V1 MELLEM):** assert at non-object fields (`'"scalar"'::jsonb`, `'[1,2]'::jsonb`) afvises af `clients_fields_is_object`-CHECK (errcode 23514). **V2 (Codex V1 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL):** assert audit-PII-hashing rammer direct-PII keys i fields selv efter felt-definitionen er sat is_active=false.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10837:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:2015:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql` (V7 + V10 cron-context) | T1: opret aktiv klient → `client_node_place` succeeds → pending oprettes → approve+apply succeeds → placement findes. T2: `client_set_active(client_id, false)` → ny `client_node_place` på samme klient + nyt team → forvent **22023 `client_inactive`**. T3 (apply-path-scenarie): non-admin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → non-admin approver → deaktiver klient → apply → forvent **P0001 `apply_client_place: client_inactive`**. T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T5 superadmin-bypass wrapper (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success. **T6 (V10 cron-context):** superadmin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → simulér cron-apply (kør apply uden auth-context via `reset role` + direct `_apply_client_place`-call eller `pending_change_apply` som service_role) → success (bypass via `is_admin_by_employee_id(requested_by)`). **T7 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → superadmin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → success (bypass via approved_by). **T8 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → non-admin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → P0001 (ingen admin involveret). Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10838:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:2026:  2. **R7d-allowlist (KRÆVET):** Tilføj `core_identity.client_field_definitions_list` til `LEGACY_IS_ACTIVE_EXEMPT_FUNCTIONS` (`scripts/fitness.mjs:149-154`). RPC'en bruger `where p_include_inactive or is_active = true` for at filtrere aktive felt-definitioner. `client_field_definitions` har KUN is_active (ingen status-kolonne) — matcher allowliste-kommentaren: "T9-tabellerne har is_active som lifecycle-signal alene; ingen status-kolonne. Disse er allowlist'et nedenfor."
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10839:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:2036:    "core_identity.client_field_definitions_list", // V6 — T10.12 RPC; client_field_definitions har kun is_active, ingen status
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10840:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:2042:- **Afhængigheder:** T10.12 (`client_field_definitions_list`-RPC skal eksistere så allowlist-entry refererer reel funktion)
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10841:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:2051:| Hver write-RPC har GRANT + INSERT/UPDATE-policy + session-var  | ja     | T10.8/T10.9/T10.10/T10.10a/T10.11 — `stork.allow_clients_write` / `allow_client_field_definitions_write` + `revoke/grant execute` + has_permission('manage', true). **T10.7b** (`client_node_place` + `client_node_close` + `_apply_client_place`) — `stork.t9_write_authorized = 'true'` før `pending_change_request` (V9-fix); apply-handler tjekker eksistens (P0002) + aktiv (P0001) med employee-id-baseret admin-bypass (V10-fix); pending_change_apply-dispatcher (T9-supplement) cases `client_place` + `client_close` ramt automatisk. **T10.13** (permission-seed) — `stork.t9_write_authorized` (V4-fix) som krævet af T9-supplement's INSERT-policies på permission_pages/tabs/role_permission_grants. Default-privileges på `core_identity` schema (T1: `grant execute on functions to authenticated`) dækker GRANT for alle T10-RPC'er. |

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10851:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:5896:docs/coordination/trin-10-plan.md:105:| 3   | KRITISK/FUNKTIONELT | T10.1 + T10.2 + T10.8 + T10.9 + T10.11 + T10.12 | `has_permission(p_page, NULL, false)` med `p_tab_key=NULL` springer tab-resolver over (`20260518000010_t9_seed_owners.sql:35`) og prøver kun page/area-grants. Write-paths bruger allerede 'manage' tab — konsistent.                                               |

Hvis felt-definitionen senere får ny `key` eller `pii_level='none'`, vil eksisterende `clients.fields`-værdier skrives i klartekst i audit. V2-fixet for `is_active=false` dækker ikke key-rename eller pii-downgrade. | **ACCEPT.** Gør `key` og `pii_level` effektivt immutable for eksisterende definitions via T10.10's RPC: blokér UPDATE af `key`; blokér `pii_level` direct → non-direct. Tilføj smoke-test der verificerer begge invariants. | T10.10 + T10.15                    |

V10 tilføjer/ændrer write-veje i T10.7b (`client_node_place`, `client_node_close`, `_apply_client_place`) + T10.10a (`client_field_definition_set_active`) — manglende krydstjek. | **ACCEPT.** Fundament-tjek-tabel udvidet med T10.7b (GRANT/policy/session-var + apply-dispatch + jsonb payload producer/consumer) og T10.10a. Eksempel-row-tjek udvidet med immutable-key + pii-downgrade-block + active-check. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10921:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:7325:docs/coordination/trin-10-plan.md:1515:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql` (V7 + V10 cron-context) | T1: opret aktiv klient → `client_node_place` succeeds → pending oprettes → approve+apply succeeds → placement findes. T2: `client_set_active(client_id, false)` → ny `client_node_place` på samme klient + nyt team → forvent **22023 `client_inactive`**. T3 (apply-path-scenarie): non-admin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → non-admin approver → deaktiver klient → apply → forvent **P0001 `apply_client_place: client_inactive`**. T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T5 superadmin-bypass wrapper (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success. **T6 (V10 cron-context):** superadmin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → simulér cron-apply (kør apply uden auth-context via `reset role` + direct `_apply_client_place`-call eller `pending_change_apply` som service_role) → success (bypass via `is_admin_by_employee_id(requested_by)`). **T7 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → superadmin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → success (bypass via approved_by). **T8 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → non-admin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → P0001 (ingen admin involveret). Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10922:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:7327:docs/coordination/trin-10-plan.md:1551:| Hver write-RPC har GRANT + INSERT/UPDATE-policy + session-var  | ja     | T10.8/T10.9/T10.10/T10.10a/T10.11 — `stork.allow_clients_write` / `allow_client_field_definitions_write` + `revoke/grant execute` + has_permission('manage', true). **T10.7b** (`client_node_place` + `client_node_close` + `_apply_client_place`) — `stork.t9_write_authorized = 'true'` før `pending_change_request` (V9-fix); apply-handler tjekker eksistens (P0002) + aktiv (P0001) med employee-id-baseret admin-bypass (V10-fix); pending_change_apply-dispatcher (T9-supplement) cases `client_place` + `client_close` ramt automatisk. **T10.13** (permission-seed) — `stork.t9_write_authorized` (V4-fix) som krævet af T9-supplement's INSERT-policies på permission_pages/tabs/role_permission_grants. Default-privileges på `core_identity` schema (T1: `grant execute on functions to authenticated`) dækker GRANT for alle T10-RPC'er. |

ROLLBACK ved test-slut sikrer ingen lækage. | T10.15     |

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10928:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:113:| 2   | G-NUMMER-KANDIDAT → ADOPT | T10.13                     | Tab/grant-INSERT-queries filtrerer på `p.name in ('clients', 'client_field_definitions')` uden at scope til `org_structure`-area. docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10929:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:127:| 1   | KRITISK  | T10.6                  | `clients_validate_fields()` trigger-funktion har `cfd.is_active = true` filter. Rammer fitness-check `legacy-is-active-readers` (`scripts/fitness.mjs:830-892`). T10.16 allowlister kun `client_field_definitions_list`.                                                                    | Codex runde 7     | **ACCEPT.** Udvid T10.16 med `core_identity.clients_validate_fields`. Forretningsmæssigt korrekt at filtrere på aktive felt-definitioner i validate-trigger (LENIENT: ukendte/inaktive keys → warning) — det er ikke R7d-pattern (employees-dual-column), bare lifecycle-signal. |

Write-paths bruger allerede 'manage' tab — konsistent.                                               |

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10939:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:204:| 1   | KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL | T10.10 / T10.5 | Audit-hashing afhænger af mutable `client_field_definitions.key`/`pii_level`. V2-fixet for `is_active=false` dækker ikke key-rename eller pii-downgrade. | **ACCEPT.** Gør `key` og `pii_level` effektivt immutable for eksisterende definitions via T10.10's RPC: blokér UPDATE af `key`; blokér `pii_level` direct → non-direct. docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10945:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:498:**Begrundelse:** Default-null på logo-parametre i client_upsert ville utilsigtet slette logo ved almindelig UPDATE (datatab). Dedikeret `client_logo_set` + `client_logo_clear` + `client_logo_get` adskiller logo-håndtering eksplicit.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10946:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:500:### `clients` + `client_field_definitions` får retention_type='permanent' (kræver allowlist-udvidelse)
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10947:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:502:**Begrundelse:** Krav-dok §2.5.1 + §2.5.2 siger klient-rækken bevares evigt; client_field_definitions er konfig-tabel der også bevares evigt. `permanent` matcher denne semantik bedst. D1b-allowlist skal udvides for at retention-validate-trigger ikke blokerer.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10948:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:508:### `client_field_definitions` er global (ikke pr-klient)

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10950:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:580:    'Trin 10: klient-master. name er identifikator; fields jsonb indeholder pr-klient værdier per client_field_definitions. is_active toggle erstatter DELETE (krav-dok §2.5.2). Test rammer due-gate, ikke aktiv-checken. | **ACCEPT.** T10.15 udvidet med setup-disciplin: BEGIN-blokken sætter `set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', true)` + UPDATE `undo_settings SET undo_period_seconds = 0 WHERE change_type IN ('client_place', 'client_close')` transaction-local. ROLLBACK ved test-slut sikrer ingen lækage. | T10.15     |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11001:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1160:43:| 1   | KRITISK           | Fundament-tjek               | Tabellen nævner kun T10.8/T10.9/T10.10/T10.11 + T10.13. V10 tilføjer/ændrer write-veje i T10.7b (`client_node_place`, `client_node_close`, `_apply_client_place`) + T10.10a (`client_field_definition_set_active`) — manglende krydstjek. | **ACCEPT.** Fundament-tjek-tabel udvidet med T10.7b (GRANT/policy/session-var + apply-dispatch + jsonb payload producer/consumer) og T10.10a. Eksempel-row-tjek udvidet med immutable-key + pii-downgrade-block + active-check. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11002:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1172:108:| 3   | MELLEM   | T10.15             | Smoke-test dækker FK-eksistens + ON DELETE RESTRICT, men ikke det vigtigste forretningskrav (krav-dok §2.5.2: inaktiv klient kan ikke vælges).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | **ACCEPT.** Ny separat smoke-test `t10_client_active_check.sql` med 4 scenarier: aktiv place success, inaktiv place rejection (22023), pending-mens-aktiv + deaktiver + apply rejection (P0001), close virker på inaktiv klient.                                                                                                                                                                                   | T10.15 + ny test-fil          |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11003:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1175:128:| 6   | KRITISK             | T10.15 `t10_client_node_placements_fk.sql`      | Smoke-test INSERT'er i `core_identity.client_node_placements` som er på `TX_WRAP_REQUIRED_FOR_TEST_INSERT` (`scripts/fitness.mjs:110`). Fitness-check `db-test-tx-wrap-on-immutable-insert` (`:901-924`) kræver `begin;` + `rollback;` på linje-niveau.                                                                                                | Code-validering  | **ACCEPT.** Eksplicit `begin;` + `rollback;` wrap-pattern i T10.15's FK-test specifikation. T10.7a's fixture-INSERT i T9-tests sker indenfor eksisterende BEGIN/ROLLBACK (verificeret: `t9_placements.sql:9` + `:213`, `t9_backdated_historical_traversal.sql:9` + `:311`).                                                                                                                            |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11004:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1180:160:| 1   | KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL | T10.10 / T10.5 | Audit-hashing afhænger af mutable `client_field_definitions.key`/`pii_level`. Hvis felt-definitionen senere får ny `key` eller `pii_level='none'`, vil eksisterende `clients.fields`-værdier skrives i klartekst i audit. V2-fixet for `is_active=false` dækker ikke key-rename eller pii-downgrade. | **ACCEPT.** Gør `key` og `pii_level` effektivt immutable for eksisterende definitions via T10.10's RPC: blokér UPDATE af `key`; blokér `pii_level` direct → non-direct. Tilføj smoke-test der verificerer begge invariants. | T10.10 + T10.15                    |

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11011:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1254:1388:### T10.12 — Read-RPC'er (`client_get`, `client_list`, `client_field_definitions_list`)
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11012:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1260:1533:- **Hvad:** Seks smoke-tests dækker centrale flows. V7 tilføjer `t10_client_active_check.sql` for T10.7b-leverancen.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11013:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1261:1543:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql` (V7 + V10 cron-context + V13 undo-setup) | **V13-SETUP (Codex runde 12):** efter `begin;` skal testen sætte `stork.t9_write_authorized='true'` og UPDATE `core_identity.undo_settings SET undo_period_seconds = 0 WHERE change_type IN ('client_place','client_close')` for at omgå T9's 24-timers default-undo-periode. ROLLBACK ved test-slut isolerer ændringen. Uden dette rammer apply-vej `not_yet_due` før aktiv-check. **Tests:** T1: opret aktiv klient → `client_node_place` succeeds → pending oprettes → approve+apply succeeds → placement findes. T2: `client_set_active(client_id, false)` → ny `client_node_place` på samme klient + nyt team → forvent **22023 `client_inactive`**. T3 (apply-path-scenarie): non-admin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → non-admin approver → deaktiver klient → apply → forvent **P0001 `apply_client_place: client_inactive`**. T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T4a (V14):** `client_node_close` på ikke-eksisterende client_id → forvent **P0002 `client_not_found`** (eksistens-check tilføjet i V14). **T5 superadmin-bypass wrapper (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success. **T6 (V10 cron-context):** superadmin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → simulér cron-apply (kør apply uden auth-context via `reset role` + direct `_apply_client_place`-call eller `pending_change_apply` som service_role) → success (bypass via `is_admin_by_employee_id(requested_by)`). **T7 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → superadmin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → success (bypass via approved_by). **T8 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → non-admin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → P0001 (ingen admin involveret). Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11014:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1267:1579:| Hver write-RPC har GRANT + INSERT/UPDATE-policy + session-var  | ja     | T10.8/T10.9/T10.10/T10.10a/T10.11 — `stork.allow_clients_write` / `allow_client_field_definitions_write` + `revoke/grant execute` + has_permission('manage', true). **T10.7b** (`client_node_place` + `client_node_close` + `_apply_client_place`) — `stork.t9_write_authorized = 'true'` før `pending_change_request` (V9-fix); apply-handler tjekker eksistens (P0002) + aktiv (P0001) med employee-id-baseret admin-bypass (V10-fix); pending_change_apply-dispatcher (T9-supplement) cases `client_place` + `client_close` ramt automatisk. **T10.13** (permission-seed) — `stork.t9_write_authorized` (V4-fix) som krævet af T9-supplement's INSERT-policies på permission_pages/tabs/role_permission_grants. Default-privileges på `core_identity` schema (T1: `grant execute on functions to authenticated`) dækker GRANT for alle T10-RPC'er. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11015:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1270:1595:| `t10_client_active_check.sql` (V7)  | Aktiv place success + inaktiv place 22023 + pending+deaktiver+apply P0001 + close inaktiv success + superadmin-bypass | grøn             |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11016:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1280:1713:- T10.15 `t10_client_active_check.sql`: setup-disciplin tilføjet — UPDATE `undo_settings.undo_period_seconds = 0` for `client_place`/`client_close` transaction-local. Omgår T9's 24-timers default-undo-periode der ellers ville få apply til at fejle med `not_yet_due` før aktiv-check rammes. ROLLBACK isolerer.

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11064:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1589:- **Hvad:** Seks smoke-tests dækker centrale flows. V7 tilføjer `t10_client_active_check.sql` for T10.7b-leverancen.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11065:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1594:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_lifecycle.sql`                                             | client_upsert (INSERT + UPDATE), client_set_active toggle, client_get returnerer korrekt is_active. has_permission-spærring uden permission-row. is_active toggle bevarer øvrige felter. **V8 (Code walk-through #2):** assert client_upsert UPDATE rør IKKE is_active (set inaktiv → upsert med ny name → read is_active stadig false).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11066:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1595:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_field_definitions.sql`                                     | client_field_definition_upsert (INSERT + UPDATE), is_active toggle, client_field_definitions_list respekterer p_include_inactive. **Audit-PII-hashing:** insert med pii_level='direct' key i fields → audit_log har sha256-hash. **V3 (Codex V2 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL):** UPDATE af `key` afvises (errcode 22023). UPDATE af pii_level direct → none afvises (errcode 22023). pii_level none → indirect → direct accepteres. **V8 (Code walk-through #3+#4):** assert client_field_definition_upsert UPDATE rør IKKE is_active. client_field_definition_set_active toggles is_active uafhængigt.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11067:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1596:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_logo.sql`                                                  | client_logo_set + client_logo_get + client_logo_clear. **Assert client_upsert UPDATE af name/fields bevarer logo_bytes uændret** (read før+efter; sammenlign). consistency-CHECK blokerer partiel logo. client_logo_set fejler hvis ét felt er NULL. **V12 (Codex runde 11 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL):** assert at `audit_log.new_values` har `logo_filename` + `logo_bytes` SHA256-hashed (ikke klartekst) efter `client_logo_set`-kald. `logo_content_type` forbliver i klartekst i audit (pii_level='none').                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11068:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1597:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_node_placements_fk.sql`                                    | FK virker: INSERT med ikke-eksisterende client_id fejler. DELETE af klient med åbne placements fejler RESTRICT. **V6 (Code-validering fund #6):** Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped (linje-niveau) — `core_identity.client_node_placements` er på `TX_WRAP_REQUIRED_FOR_TEST_INSERT` (`scripts/fitness.mjs:110`). Fitness-check `db-test-tx-wrap-on-immutable-insert` blokerer ellers.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11069:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1598:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_clients_validate_fields.sql`                                      | LENIENT-default: unknown key i fields → warning, INSERT accepteret. Strict-mode (`stork.clients_fields_strict='true'`): unknown key → exception. **V2 (Codex V1 MELLEM):** assert at non-object fields (`'"scalar"'::jsonb`, `'[1,2]'::jsonb`) afvises af `clients_fields_is_object`-CHECK (errcode 23514). **V2 (Codex V1 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL):** assert audit-PII-hashing rammer direct-PII keys i fields selv efter felt-definitionen er sat is_active=false.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11070:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1599:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql` (V7 + V10 cron-context + V13 undo-setup) | **V13-SETUP (Codex runde 12):** efter `begin;` skal testen sætte `stork.t9_write_authorized='true'` og UPDATE `core_identity.undo_settings SET undo_period_seconds = 0 WHERE change_type IN ('client_place','client_close')` for at omgå T9's 24-timers default-undo-periode. ROLLBACK ved test-slut isolerer ændringen. Uden dette rammer apply-vej `not_yet_due` før aktiv-check. **Tests:** T1: opret aktiv klient → `client_node_place` succeeds → pending oprettes → approve+apply succeeds → placement findes. T2: `client_set_active(client_id, false)` → ny `client_node_place` på samme klient + nyt team → forvent **22023 `client_inactive`**. T3 (apply-path-scenarie): non-admin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → non-admin approver → deaktiver klient → apply → forvent **P0001 `apply_client_place: client_inactive`**. T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T4a (V14):** `client_node_close` på ikke-eksisterende client_id → forvent **P0002 `client_not_found`** (eksistens-check tilføjet i V14). **T5 superadmin-bypass wrapper (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success. **T6 (V10 cron-context):** superadmin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → simulér cron-apply (kør apply uden auth-context via `reset role` + direct `_apply_client_place`-call eller `pending_change_apply` som service_role) → success (bypass via `is_admin_by_employee_id(requested_by)`). **T7 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → superadmin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → success (bypass via approved_by). **T8 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → non-admin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → P0001 (ingen admin involveret). Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11071:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1610:  2. **R7d-allowlist (KRÆVET):** Tilføj `core_identity.client_field_definitions_list` til `LEGACY_IS_ACTIVE_EXEMPT_FUNCTIONS` (`scripts/fitness.mjs:149-154`). RPC'en bruger `where p_include_inactive or is_active = true` for at filtrere aktive felt-definitioner. `client_field_definitions` har KUN is_active (ingen status-kolonne) — matcher allowliste-kommentaren: "T9-tabellerne har is_active som lifecycle-signal alene; ingen status-kolonne. Disse er allowlist'et nedenfor."
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11072:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1620:    "core_identity.client_field_definitions_list", // V6 — T10.12 RPC; client_field_definitions har kun is_active, ingen status
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11073:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1626:- **Afhængigheder:** T10.12 (`client_field_definitions_list`-RPC skal eksistere så allowlist-entry refererer reel funktion)
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11074:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1635:| Hver write-RPC har GRANT + INSERT/UPDATE-policy + session-var  | ja     | T10.8/T10.9/T10.10/T10.10a/T10.11 — `stork.allow_clients_write` / `allow_client_field_definitions_write` + `revoke/grant execute` + has_permission('manage', true). **T10.7b** (`client_node_place` + `client_node_close` + `_apply_client_place`) — `stork.t9_write_authorized = 'true'` før `pending_change_request` (V9-fix); apply-handler tjekker eksistens (P0002) + aktiv (P0001) med employee-id-baseret admin-bypass (V10-fix); pending_change_apply-dispatcher (T9-supplement) cases `client_place` + `client_close` ramt automatisk. **T10.13** (permission-seed) — `stork.t9_write_authorized` (V4-fix) som krævet af T9-supplement's INSERT-policies på permission_pages/tabs/role_permission_grants. Default-privileges på `core_identity` schema (T1: `grant execute on functions to authenticated`) dækker GRANT for alle T10-RPC'er. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11075:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1636:| Hver SELECT-policy bred nok til legitime læsere                | ja     | T10.1, T10.2 — has_permission('clients'/'client_field_definitions', 'manage', false) **tab-aware (V6-fix)**. T10.13 seeder kun tab-grants → null-tab matcher ikke; 'manage' matcher. T9-supplement's ACL-scoped policy på client_node_placements bevares uændret.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11078:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1854:- **Migration-fil:** `supabase/migrations/<ts>_t10_client_upsert_rpc.sql`
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11079:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1900:### T10.10 — `client_field_definition_upsert` RPC (uden p_match_role; V3: immutable key + pii_level-downgrade-block)
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11080:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-14.md:1903:- **Hvad:** SECURITY DEFINER write-RPC for client_field_definitions. has_permission('client_field_definitions', 'manage', true). **V3 (Codex V2 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL):** UPDATE forbyder ændring af `key` (audit-PII-hash i clients.fields ville miste reference); UPDATE forbyder pii_level direct → non-direct (eksisterende værdier ville pludselig skrives i klartekst i audit). For at ændre `key`: marker den gamle definition `is_active=false` og INSERT en ny. For at sænke pii-niveau: behandl som ny definition.

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11132:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-13.md:365:| 1   | KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL | T10.10 / T10.5 | Audit-hashing afhænger af mutable `client_field_definitions.key`/`pii_level`. Hvis felt-definitionen senere får ny `key` eller `pii_level='none'`, vil eksisterende `clients.fields`-værdier skrives i klartekst i audit. V2-fixet for `is_active=false` dækker ikke key-rename eller pii-downgrade. | **ACCEPT.** Gør `key` og `pii_level` effektivt immutable for eksisterende definitions via T10.10's RPC: blokér UPDATE af `key`; blokér `pii_level` direct → non-direct. Tilføj smoke-test der verificerer begge invariants. | T10.10 + T10.15                    |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11133:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-13.md:396:| T1-drop af D5's public-schema                                                                          | `supabase/migrations/20260514120000_t1_drop_public.sql:32-92`                                                  | Dropper `public.clients`, `public.client_field_definitions`, `public.client_upsert`, `public.client_field_definition_upsert`, `public.clients_validate_fields`, `public.audit_filter_values`, `public.is_admin()`, `public.stork_audit()` etc. INGEN post-T1 migration genskaber clients.                                                                                                               |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11134:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-13.md:424:| `LEGACY_IS_ACTIVE_EXEMPT_FUNCTIONS` i fitness-script                                                   | `scripts/fitness.mjs:149-154`                                                                                  | Allowlist for funktioner der bruger `is_active = true` filter uden tilsvarende `status = 'active'`-check. Trin 10 tilføjer `core_identity.client_field_definitions_list` (T10.16) fordi `client_field_definitions` har kun is_active, ingen status-kolonne. **FK_COVERAGE_EXEMPTIONS findes IKKE** — master-plan §3.19 ikke implementeret (V6-fund #4).                                                 |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11135:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-13.md:443:- Etablering af `core_identity.client_field_definitions`-tabel fra bunden (uden match_role)
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11136:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-13.md:449:- SECURITY DEFINER RPC'er: client_upsert (uden logo), client_set_active, client_field_definition_upsert (uden p_match_role), client_logo_set, client_logo_clear, client_logo_get, client_get, client_list, client_field_definitions_list
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11137:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-13.md:453:- Fitness-script-opdatering (tilføj `client_field_definitions_list` til `LEGACY_IS_ACTIVE_EXEMPT_FUNCTIONS`)
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11138:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-13.md:512:   263	**Begrundelse:** Default-null på logo-parametre i client_upsert ville utilsigtet slette logo ved almindelig UPDATE (datatab). Dedikeret `client_logo_set` + `client_logo_clear` + `client_logo_get` adskiller logo-håndtering eksplicit.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11139:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-13.md:514:   265	### `clients` + `client_field_definitions` får retention_type='permanent' (kræver allowlist-udvidelse)
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11140:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-13.md:516:   267	**Begrundelse:** Krav-dok §2.5.1 + §2.5.2 siger klient-rækken bevares evigt; client_field_definitions er konfig-tabel der også bevares evigt. `permanent` matcher denne semantik bedst. D1b-allowlist skal udvides for at retention-validate-trigger ikke blokerer.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11141:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-13.md:522:   273	### `client_field_definitions` er global (ikke pr-klient)

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11198:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-13.md:1403:  1139	- **Hvad:** SECURITY DEFINER write-RPC for client_field_definitions. has_permission('client_field_definitions', 'manage', true). **V3 (Codex V2 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL):** UPDATE forbyder ændring af `key` (audit-PII-hash i clients.fields ville miste reference); UPDATE forbyder pii_level direct → non-direct (eksisterende værdier ville pludselig skrives i klartekst i audit).
